name: Pharos Agent API
description: AI DeFi copilot for Pharos Network (chain ID 1672). RAG-grounded ecosystem knowledge plus read-only swap/bridge quotes via LI.FI. Non-custodial: never signs or broadcasts transactions.

endpoints.description: Ask anything about the Pharos ecosystem, its dapps, RWA, or DeFi concepts. Answers are grounded in a vector knowledge base with source citations.
Read-only LI.FI quote for a token swap on Pharos or a bridge to Ethereum/Base/Arbitrum/Polygon/Optimism. Returns estimate + unsigned transactionRequest.

request.fromToken: PROS | WPROS | USDC | WETH | LINK | PGOLD | USDpm
request.toToken: PROS | WPROS | USDC | WETH | LINK | PGOLD | USDpm

endpoints.description: Live token price via CoinGecko (60s cache). Supported tokens: PROS, WPROS, BTC, ETH, WETH, USDC, LINK.

security.signing: never — quotes only; users sign in their own wallet
